reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: The Xthings (U-tec) integration needs to re-authenticate your account.

init.title: Xthings Options
init.description:
Enable push notifications for near-instant state updates. Nabu Casa Cloud status: **{cloud_status}**.

If you have Nabu Casa, leave the URL blank to use a cloudhook automatically. Otherwise, enter your externally reachable Home Assistant URL (e.g. `https://my-ha.duckdns.org`).

application_credentials.description:
To obtain credentials, open the Xthings / ULTRALOQ app, go to **Settings > OpenAPI**, and activate it. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** shown there.

Set the **Redirect URI** in the app to:
`{redirect_url}`

set_lock_mode.name: Set lock mode
set_lock_mode.description: Set the operating mode on a lock device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The Xthings device ID of the lock (e.g. MAC address).

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: The lock mode to set (integer value).

list_lock_users.name: List lock users
list_lock_users.description: Retrieve all users configured on a lock device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The Xthings device ID of the lock.

add_lock_user.name: Add lock user
add_lock_user.description: Add a new user (access code) to a lock device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The Xthings device ID of the lock.

user_name.name: User name
user_name.description: Display name for the lock user.

date_range.name: Date range
date_range.description: Date range for temporary users (list of two strings: start, end). Example: ["2024-07-01 00:00", "2024-07-31 23:59"].

weeks.name: Allowed days
weeks.description: Days of the week the user can unlock (0=Sunday through 6=Saturday).

time_range.name: Time range
time_range.description: Daily time window for access (list of two strings: start, end). Example: ["08:00", "18:00"].

limit.name: Unlock limit
limit.description: Maximum number of unlocks allowed. 0 or omit for unlimited.

update_lock_user.name: Update lock user
update_lock_user.description: Update an existing user on a lock device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The Xthings device ID of the lock.

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: The lock user ID to update.

user_name.name: User name
user_name.description: New display name for the lock user.

weeks.name: Allowed days
weeks.description: Days of the week the user can unlock.

delete_lock_user.name: Delete lock user
delete_lock_user.description: Remove a user from a lock device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The Xthings device ID of the lock.

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: The lock user ID to delete.
